mapper.select: SELECT todo_id, user_id, category_id, title, content, todo_date, status, priority, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND todo_date = #{todoDate} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, created_at DESC

SELECT todo_id, user_id, category_id, title, content, todo_date, status, priority, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todos WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos ( user_id, category_id, title, content, todo_date, status, priority, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{todoDate}, #{status}, #{priority}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, todo_date = #{todoDate}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN NVL(completed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE todos SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
